Hey, what's up guys? So a couple of quick tidbits that I just wanted to just details that I wanted to make sure that Got reinforced one make sure you're doing the pre-qualification questionnaire. It's going to preset all of the Continuity long term etc. Okay, that's one two When you ask people which one you prefer if they're like, I'm not really sure It's like it just really depends on whether you want to do the long term long term fix you're looking for a quick fix A long-term solution or look for a quick fix Most people say long-term solution and then you say awesome and you should just do this one, right? Which would be the EFT plan so that's a little detail that works well Another detail make sure that you're mentioning to them that they earn as they burns That's like kind of the incentive of helping them get great results While they are doing the six-week challenge without having the whole money back component to it if they sign up as an EFT The last thing or fourth thing that I want to add so I guess I have four things is that when you add In When they're doing the six-week they're getting the six-week challenge for free And they're just signing up as an EFT. You can also add In the contract that if they leave before their 12 months is over or within the first six months They have to still pay for the deposit for the challenge that they received so it just kind of reinforces The sale and gives you kind of a little bit of a stick for Keeping them on not that I think that like you should always have sticks, but I think that that's Dan Dan Romain had that idea. I thought that was really good So he had that in his contract. He didn't have any more console-setting issues with it and It's just something that keeps people on in longevity a lot more easily So those are four quick tips for you to also make sure that you're mentioning do the pre-qualification questionnaire Don't forget earn as you burn when you when you present the two offers You can frame them as like do you want the long-term solution? Do you want a quick fix? Right? You already did all the questionnaire So they're gonna be like I want the long-term solution and then you'll give them that option really is the main option and If they leave before the six months is over Or 12 months is over if you can say if you leave within the six months even though they're in a 12-month contract You have to pay for the challenge So hope that makes sense use those things those were all common ingredients that guys were doing the best and See you soon
